ValidationRule.description: si HasPerfFees = false alors IsESMAPerfFeesGuidelines = N/A
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c), $Permission.PRPProductStrategy = true, ISPICKVAL(HasPerfFees__c, "False"), NOT( ISPICKVAL(IsESMAPerfFeesGuidelines__c, "N/A") ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Is ESMA Perf Fees Guidelines must be N/A when Has Perf Fees = False.
